predformer (original) - mse:12.296335220336914, mae:30.311744689941406, ssim:0.9570595026016235, psnr:31.291467666625977
label_embedding - mse:16.61557388305664, mae:58.35621643066406, ssim:0.9123011231422424, psnr:27.786527633666992
rope_attention - mse:9.408588409423828, mae:26.26174545288086, ssim:0.9800403118133545, psnr:31.99542808532715
final - mse:4.963071346282959, mae:12.798995971679688, ssim:0.9908592104911804, psnr:39.19610595703125
